title: Select CityWalk is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Select CityWalk is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!
